mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-OceanBase SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-OceanBase SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at open_contact@oceanbase.com; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.
